core_mechanism: maximum-likelihood parameter estimation against a parameterized physics-based forward (generative) model, with the Cramér–Rao / Fisher-information bound setting the fundamental achievable precision on the inferred parameters
brief_reason: The abstract's method rests on deriving maximum-likelihood estimators for the unknown parameters of a parameterized forward model and quantifying their fundamental limits via the Cramér–Rao bound, which the ML estimators are shown to approach at high SNR.
